  deletePipelines, dp    Delete pipelines

  readProject, rp        Read project information and print it to console as

result.stderr:
GitLabTools.Tool 1.0.0+5603551a6ea899ac852ae48e8865afab30431c14
Copyright (C) 2026 Markus Blasek
USAGE:
Delete old pipelines of a project but keep at least 80 pipelines:
  dotnet gitlabtools deletePipelines --accessToken <PersonalAccessToken>
  --pipelinesToKeep 80 --projectId 123456 --gitLabUrl
  https://mygitlabinstance.com
Delete old pipelines of a project which are older than 60 days but keep at least
80 pipelines:
  dotnet gitlabtools deletePipelines --accessToken <PersonalAccessToken>
  --pipelinesToKeep 80 --pipelinesOlderThanInDays 60 --projectId 123456
  --gitLabUrl https://mygitlabinstance.com
Delete old pipelines of a project - dry run (no changes are made):
  dotnet gitlabtools deletePipelines --accessToken <PersonalAccessToken>
  --dryRun --pipelinesToKeep 80 --projectId 123456 --gitLabUrl
  https://mygitlabinstance.com
Delete old pipelines of all projects of a group but keep 80 pipelines:
  dotnet gitlabtools deletePipelines --accessToken <PersonalAccessToken>
  --groupId 654321 --pipelinesToKeep 80 --gitLabUrl https://mygitlabinstance.com
Delete old pipelines of all projects of a group which are older than 60 days but
keep at least 80 pipelines (of each project):
  dotnet gitlabtools deletePipelines --accessToken <PersonalAccessToken>
  --groupId 654321 --pipelinesToKeep 80 --pipelinesOlderThanInDays 60
  --gitLabUrl https://mygitlabinstance.com

  -p, --projectId                   Project ID to delete pipelines from

  -g, --groupId                     Group ID to delete pipelines from

  -k, --pipelinesToKeep             (Default: 50) Number of pipelines to keep

  -o, --pipelinesOlderThanInDays    Delete pipelines which are older than
                                    entered value in days (the creation date
                                    time of the pipeline is used)

  -d, --dryRun                      Dry run - no changes will be made

  -u, --gitLabUrl                   Required. URL to gitlab instance

  -a, --accessToken                 Required. Personal access token for gitlab
                                    rest api with scope 'api'

  --help                            Display this help screen.

  --version                         Display version information.
